summary: Branch production diff is clean (Wire fail-closed hardening already security-reviewed, dead-code delete, doc + cosmetic). Headline is a user-flagged, full-scanned systemic swallow: catalog TryConvert's Error slot is discarded across the conversion read/write path. F1 MAJOR — Conversion.cs:229 inserts unconverted values into a typed list<T> (element-type invariant silently violated); :361/:375 silently drop failed elements; dict/this.cs:190 returns null; variable/list/this.cs:420/439/457/534 keep the wrong-typed value and let a reflection ArgumentException replace TryConvert's slot-named error. The same file's IList arm (381-409) and variable/set.cs:63 already do it right — same-shape-second-site with a correct sibling = FAIL. F2/F3 MINOR: builder/code/Default.cs:608 and actor/this.cs:127 discard IError. Fix is code authoring -> coder.

findings.title: catalog TryConvert errors discarded; typed-list element invariant silently violated
build pass discards GetCodeGenerated IError, silently skips unresolvable action
%MyIdentity% resolution discards Code.Get IError, collapses to null
